S.TRANSL: My father speaks the Tao language with us at home.

S.TRANSL: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

S.TRANSL: I went out with my mother today.

S.TRANSL: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

S.TRANSL: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

S.PHON: ko~u pa ®i ®in …ēi ina am, "ja na ikaba…ĽaŇčbaŇč no~u aŇčit aŇč?"

S.TRANSL: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

S.TRANSL: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.

S.FORM: ya mian do katangked no vahay namen o gako ko, ko mangday so araraw a ya malam a mangey do gako, no ya misiasiay am ko malam a moli do vahay namen.
S.PHON: ja mian …Ėo~u kataŇčk…ô…Ė no~u fa…įaj nam…ôn o~u gako~u ko~u, ko~u maŇč…Ėaj āo~u a…Ľa…Ľaw a ja malam a maŇč…ôj …Ėo~u gako~u, no~u ja mi…ēia…ēiaj am ko~u malam a mo~uli …Ėo~u fa…įaj nam…ôn.

S.TRANSL: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

S.TRANSL: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.
